narrative:
Union City has 4,781 registered voters, with 56.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.2 percentage points.
